name: Valiant Holding AG
summary: Valiant Holding AG, together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services for private retail clients, affluent private clients, self-employed individuals, and small and medium-sized companies. The company offers savings accounts; real estate financing; loans for working capital and other basic services for businesses; unsecured and consumer loans; payment transaction services through its mobile banking app; and retirement planning and investment solutions, as well as electronic banking services. It operates approximately 96 branch offices and 240 ATMs in 13 cantons in Switzerland. The company was founded in 1824 and is based in Lucerne, Switzerland.
